MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, NA AND LARRY JOHNSTON'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: this case is stayed pending a decision of the arbitrator as to what issues are and are not arbitrable. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
